actions.text: Referred to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure, and in addition to the Committees on the Judiciary, and Homeland Security, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.

official_title: To amend title 49, United States Code, to combat freight fraud and theft, and for other purposes.

titles.title: Securing American Freight, Enforcement, and Reliability in Transport Act
